title: 'Abraham #0085
definition:
Abraham = "father of a multitude" or "chief of multitude"

 1) friend of God and founder of Hebrew nation via God's
    elective covenant
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abraham = "father of a multitude" or "chief of multitude"

 1) friend of God and founder of Hebrew nation via God's
    elective covenant

    NASB:  exalted father, the father of the Jewish nation
